acceptance_targets: [chapter_17_prose_001] Pass if a reread of the cited lines shows no more than two surviving 'as if' comparisons across those specific beats and lines 163 and 327 no longer rely on 'not X exactly' style qualification; fail if the supper, sink, inheritance, and closing-night passages still reuse the same comparison/correction template often enough to read as a tic.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reread of the cited lines shows no more than two surviving 'as if' comparisons across those specific beats and lines 163 and 327 no longer rely on 'not X exactly' style qualification; fail if the supper, sink, inheritance, and closing-night passages still reuse the same comparison/correction template often enough to read as a tic.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly falls back on the same comparison and qualification scaffolds, especially 'as if' constructions and corrective hedges such as 'not X exactly.' Once that pattern recurs across the opening description, table comedy, reconciliation, inheritance handoff, and night-settling beats, the prose starts to feel mechanically self-similar instead of pressure-shaped.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated scaffold sentences at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:65, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:119, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:181, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:319, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:343, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:377, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:397, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:457, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:511, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:631, then replace the corrective hedges at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:327 with direct description. Keep only the comparisons that do irreplaceable work and convert the rest into concrete action, sound, or bodily consequence so each scene turn has a different sentence shape.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into queer secrecy, erotic specificity, dust-sick bodies, economic shame, bad bargains, and the humiliations of dependence. When deciding between a tidier scene and a truer one, choose the version that preserves historical pressure and emotional contradiction even if it leaves characters compromised, unsympathetic, or exposed.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If grief, desire, debt, illness, bodily damage, or shame are abstracted at the moment they should become sensory and social, rewrite toward the concrete consequence until the scene stops hiding from itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: moderate-high - contractions are the baseline for speech; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, social performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural rhythms across the book: survival set-piece, aftermath inventory, intimate chamber scene, bureaucratic squeeze, outdoor search, quiet communal ritual, preparation without payoff, public reckoning, and departure elegy. Vary scene counts, dialogue density, and where the turn comes from so consecutive chapters never feel built from the same dramatic machine.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken and period-credible, with agricultural, domestic, and biblical undertones used sparingly; favor exact nouns and verbs over decorative frontier lyricism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person rotating among Cora, Thea, Dell, August, and Hester, with only brief collective widening when weather or communal memory demands it
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive prose: longer weather and labor sentences that can suddenly snap short at revelation, pain, or shame.
